reasoning: With the knowledge cutoff at November 9, 2025, less than two months remain in the calendar year. Regime changes in entrenched autocracies like Iran are rare events, and the base rate for such an event occurring within a two-month window is extremely low (<1%). The community market estimate was at 3% only ten days prior to the cutoff, indicating that while there may be ongoing geopolitical tensions (e.g., related to Israel or internal protests), a rapid and complete collapse of the central government by the end of 2025 is seen as highly improbable. I am therefore aligning my forecast with the market base rate of 3%, reflecting the short time horizon remaining for the resolution criteria to be met.
